159     """Build the upsert PL/pgSQL function for a single axis."""
160     return f"""
161 CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit_search_{axis}_upsert() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
162 BEGIN
163     INSERT INTO audit_search_index (
164         axis, entity_id, run_id, principal, table_fqn, workspace_id, text_corpus
165     ) VALUES (
166         '{axis}',
167         NEW.{spec["entity_col"]}::text,
168         ({spec["run_id_expr"]})::text,
169         ({spec["principal_expr"]})::text,
170         ({spec["table_fqn_expr"]})::text,
171         ({spec["workspace_id_expr"]})::int,
172         ({spec["text_expr"]})::text
173     )
174     ON CONFLICT (axis, entity_id) DO UPDATE SET
175         run_id = EXCLUDED.run_id,
176         principal = EXCLUDED.principal,
177         table_fqn = EXCLUDED.table_fqn,
178         workspace_id = EXCLUDED.workspace_id,
179         text_corpus = EXCLUDED.text_corpus;
180     RETURN NEW;
181 END;
182 $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
183 """
